narrative:
Minerva Park-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,663 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.5 percentage points.
